class.name: asv_interfaces/GoalTool
class.description: Sets a goal pose from ASV

class.name: asv_interfaces/GoalFromTool
class.description: Sets a goal pose for From location

class.name: asv_interfaces/GoalToTool
class.description: Sets a goal pose for To location

class.name: asv_interfaces/CenterOnRobotTool
class.description: Press x to center camera on robot
